name: Catch-phrase ranker
description:
THE ONE, THE ONLY, CATCH PHRASE RANKEEEEER! This bad boi can rank all of your favourite catch phrases and rest assured it will rank your favourites as a 0/10!

So what are you waiting for? Get to chatting!

Ik it doesnt have a lot of tokens but IT WORKS WELL, trust.

Ngl I stole this idea from c.ai, but I really want that bot here so yeah... 😃
